libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test execution on JDK 25, ensure the generated test configuration passes runtime system properties: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Prefer local loopback Vert.x HttpServer/WebClient coverage for GET/POST, JSON, forms/multipart, redirects, cookies/session, streaming, and caching. Do not rely on external HTTP services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: vertx-auth-oauth2 is optional in the artifact POM; OAuth2-specific WebClient flows would require extra setup and are not necessary for core coverage.
Jackson databind/POJO mapping is not on the normal runtime classpath unless explicitly added; JsonObject/Buffer/String body codecs avoid that optional dependency.
The unsafe-access properties are tied to Netty 4.2.x behavior on JDK 25 native runs and should be verified by the local Gradle/native-image workflow.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker image is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; loopback HTTP server tests are normal. However io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves Vert.x 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final, so Java 25 native runtime tests need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for 5.0.0.
